# Project Overview

## I have Registraion Form with Name, Email, Location & Course, The Registraion Form is the part of Navigation as a Component . 

Create the Node & express program to send the Registration form data to the Registration Table using MySQL Workbench.
Below are the details for the Database :
1. database Name : db_LVC
2. User ID :root
3. Password : root
4. Table Name : registration
5. Table Columns : id, name, email, location, course

Instructions :
1. Create the production ready code



## Create the Node & express program to send the signup form data to the signup Table using MySQL Workbench.

-table name: signup
